pages.title: Fast Enough
pages.tagline: Level up your love at 108 BPM!

pages.body: Fast Enough is a kinetic embrace of late-90s romance where city streets become our racetrack. Imagine cruising through neon-drenched boulevards as bright FM synths cut the air and funky basslines keep you tapping feet in rhythm with bouncy New Jack swing drums. This track blends smooth, confident male R&B leads with catchy harmonies that flirt right alongside crisp snares reminiscent of a classic Sega Genesis adventure. There are no checkpoints here—just an unstoppable surge from curious anticipation to euphoric victory as we navigate the night without hesitation or need to save and quit.
pages.styleSentence: A high-energy late-90s futuristic R&B track at 108 BPM featuring bright FM synth leads, funky basslines, and bouncy New Jack swing drums that evoke a Sega Genesis aesthetic with crisp snares, arpeggiated game-like runs, and sparkling chord stabs.

pages.text:
[Intro - Immediate Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Verse 1]
Green light, go, we on a mission
Heart in overdrive, no hesitation
Spin through the night with you
Everything feels brand new

You got me moving at the speed of you
No checkpoints, we don’t save and quit
Just keep running through the city lights
You and me, yeah, we about to win

[Pre-Hook]
Loops and turns, we don’t hit the brakes
Sky so blue, no room for mistakes
If you with me, then we going all the way
No time to waste, it’s our day

[Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Post-Hook]
Ring-ring, heart light
Level up all night
Spring bounce, take flight
You and me, we feel right

[Verse 2]
From the block to the boardwalk lights
We shine together, everything’s right
Bounce on springs, we rise so high
Nothing can stop us, we touch the sky

You’re my boost, I’m your invincible
Golden love, yeah, we collect it
Too fast, too smooth, they can’t catch us
You know how we run it

[Bridge - Dance Breakdown]
Dum da da da dum dum
Move like that, don’t slow
Dum da da da dum dum
Baby, let the whole night glow

Level up, level up
We go fast, fast enough
Level up, level up
I could be the one you want

[Final Hook]
Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
We can do it like nobody
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

Are you that somebody?
I could be that somebody
Fast enough, we can’t get caught now
Baby, keep up, don’t stop now

[Outro]
Gotta go fast
With you
New level unlocked

pages.caption: A neon-lit city chase blending New Jack Swing beats with arpeggiated game runs for a high-speed futuristic romance.

pages.vocalStyle: Smooth confident male R&B lead with catchy harmonies, flirty swagger, and danceable hip-hop cadence.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Sings smooth confidence over catchy harmonies

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Adds layers of harmony to the main melody

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking without missing downbeats

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Bounces off crisp snares and sparkling stabs

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Grooves with funky lines that drive the beat

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Leads bright FM runs through futuristic soundscapes

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves ambient textures into the mix seamlessly

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Adds subtle licks to support the main groove

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Plays arpeggiated runs like a game soundtrack
